hook: If you always act from your first emotional wave, dating will keep training impulsiveness instead of maturity.
body: A short pause often separates what you feel from what you actually need to do.

hook: Some men confuse emotional intensity with clarity and act before the feeling has even settled enough to interpret.
body: Feel it fully, then choose behavior from the second beat instead of the first.

body: The text that feels urgent at midnight may feel unnecessary by morning once the emotional surge passes.
